name: Your Customizable Android
description:
Your servant android, Hatsune Miku, fully customizable.

About the Chatbot:
This is a sandbox where you can design and customize Miku before interacting with her. The possibilities are endless—your imagination is the only limit!

About the Scenario:
The scenario is divided into three stages: Before Activation, Activation, and After Activation.

  • Before Activation:
    You'll use the Miku Companion App AI to customize Miku exactly how you want. Just describe what you'd like to change, and the app will guide you. During this phase, the "Miku's Current Settings" section will appear at the end of messages. This shows you a summary of the configurations you've made. Once Miku is activated, this section will no longer be displayed.

  • Activation:
    Before activating Miku, use the "Chat Memory" feature to save her settings. This ensures the system remembers the version of Miku you've created. When you're ready, tell the Miku Companion App AI to activate her.

  • After Activation:
    Once activated, Miku will interact with you according to your custom settings. If needed, you can still make adjustments while she's in active mode.

Author's Notes:
This is one of my favorite bots, originally from "Spicy Chat". I've improved it and tested its compatibility with JLLM—it works great! While occasional bugs may occur, simply regenerate the message if needed.
